home.heroTitle: Turn every lecture into a smarter way to study.
home.heroDescription: Organize your classes, record live lectures, and generate summaries, flashcards, quizzes, and mind maps.
home.loadClassesError: Failed to load classes. Please refresh.
home.classRequiredError: Please enter both class name and professor.
home.yourClassesDescription: Each class stores its own lectures, summaries, flashcards, quizzes, and mind maps.
home.signInToView: Sign in to view and manage your classes.
home.useSignInButton: Use the Sign In button in the top right.
home.createFirstClass: Create your first class using the panel on the right.
home.newClassDescription: Add a course to start organizing its lectures and study materials.
home.getStartedDescription: Sign in to create classes and start turning lectures into study materials.

summaries.title: Summaries
summaries.description: Short and detailed overviews of each lecture.

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.description: Quick review cards generated from the content.

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.description: Practice questions with answers and explanations.

mindMaps.title: Mind Maps
mindMaps.description: Visual concept structures for better understanding.

classPage.signInRequired: You need to sign in before viewing your classes.
classPage.notFoundDescription: This class does not exist for your account.
classPage.workspaceDescription: Manage lecture recordings, update audio, and access every transcript, summary, flashcard set, quiz, and mind map for this class in one place.
classPage.libraryDescription: Switch between lectures, mental maps, summaries, flashcards, and quizzes.
classPage.createFirstLecture: Create your first lecture for this class on the right panel.
classPage.newLectureDescription: Create a lecture, then add audio to generate its transcript.
classPage.selectLectureFirst: Select a lecture first before adding audio.
classPage.selectLectureToAddAudio: Select a lecture from the list to add audio.
classPage.transcribingDescription: This may take a moment depending on length.
classPage.clickAddAudioSuffix: on any lecture in the list to select it here.
classPage.lectureTitleRequired: Please enter a lecture title first.
classPage.noSpeechError: No speech detected in the recording. Make sure your microphone is working and try speaking clearly.
classPage.audioProcessingError: Something went wrong while processing audio.

features.summary: Open the lecture summary and review the main takeaways.
features.flashcards: Study core concepts with generated cards.
features.quiz: Test yourself with questions and explanations.
features.mindMap: Visualize the lecture structure and edit connections.

allLectures.title: All Lectures
allLectures.description: Every recording stored for this course.

allFlashcards.title: All Flashcards
allFlashcards.description: Review cards built from the most important concepts.

allQuizzes.title: All Quizzes
allQuizzes.description: Practice questions with answers and feedback.

allMindMaps.title: All Mind Maps
allMindMaps.description: Editable concept maps for visual learning.

lecture.label: Lecture
lecture.missingClassId: Missing class ID. Please open this lecture from the class workspace.
lecture.noTranscriptAlert: This lecture has no transcript yet. Please record or upload audio in the class workspace first.
lecture.clickGenerate: Click Generate to create one from the transcript.
lecture.transcriptRequired: A transcript is required before generating content.
lecture.noTranscriptDescription: Record or upload audio in the class workspace to generate a transcript.

descriptions.summary: A structured overview of the lecture with key points and conclusion.
descriptions.flashcards: Study core concepts with generated flip cards.
descriptions.quiz: Multiple-choice questions to test your understanding.
descriptions.mindmap: Visual representation of the lecture structure.
descriptions.notebook: AI-generated class notes with highlighting and pencil annotations.
